fix: correct edgeless shape text replacement by using original speaker names

- Compare Y.Text content against original names, not updated names
- Add safety checks to detect incorrect name comparisons
- Handle cases where speakerName property might be undefined
- Prevent duplicate processing of shape text fields

weren''t being updated during bulk speaker replacement.

- Fixed Y.Text length access errors by using delta operations
- Build all action item content as single delta to avoid multiple length accesses
- Removed debug logging after identifying the issue
- The error occurred when trying to access itemText.length before Y.Text was properly initialized
